testcase.name: test
testcase.system-out: charlie properties path = charlie.props game server started instantiating house house host = 127.0.0.1:1235 house successfully started House waiting for connection on port 1235 sent login request got login validated ticket BB20B45FD4D95138 login successful! ServerAuthenticator sent ticket to client received ticket BB20B45FD4D95138 DealerBlackjackTest connecting to server DealerBlackjackTest courier started Courier waiting for connection on port 8001 Arriver sending Arrival to 127.0.0.1:1235 House accepted connection on port 1235 Arriver sent successfully Arrival to 127.0.0.1:1235 Arriver sent arrival message House received message Arrival DealerBlackjackTest we ARRIVED! DealerBlackjackTest waiting for server READY... House invoking listener for Arrival validated ticket = BB20B45FD4D95138 arrival from host = LAPTOP-GGP8BH25/172.25.96.1 using default dealer = charlie.dealer.Dealer shoe property 'charlie.shoe' = 'charlie.test.shoe.UserBJShoe' shoe: charlie.test.shoe.UserBJShoe: SA D7 SJ D7 C9 H6 C4 C8 CJ RealPlayer sending Ready to 172.25.96.1:8001 RealPlayer waiting for connection on port 8501 Courier accepted connection on port 8001 RealPlayer sent successfully Ready to 172.25.96.1:8001 House waiting for connection on port 1235 Courier received message Ready Courier invoking listener for Ready received Ready from LAPTOP-GGP8BH25/172.25.96.1 DealerBlackjackTest server READY !
